Metadata.title: SKYW Group | Skyward Holding Group
Metadata.description: Skyward Holding Group is an international financial institution licensed by the Hong Kong SFC (Type 6 & Type 9), with business spanning fund management, IPO cornerstone investment, gold, commercial credit guarantee, and energy projects.
Metadata.ogDescription: Connecting Global Capital with Innovative Industries

Home.heroSubtitle: Skyward Holding Group is an SFC-licensed international financial institution dedicated to cross-border capital allocation and diversified investment management.
Home.businessSubtitle: Spanning fund management, cornerstone investments, gold industry, credit guarantee, and energy investments to deliver comprehensive financial solutions.
Home.aboutDescription: Skyward Holding Group (SKYW) is a Hong Kong-headquartered international financial institution holding SFC Type 6 (Advising on Corporate Finance) and Type 9 (Asset Management) licenses. Guided by our mission to "Connect Global Capital, Empower Innovative Industries," we leverage our professional investment team and extensive global network to provide diversified investment opportunities for institutional investors and high-net-worth clients.
Home.insightsSubtitle: Latest updates and industry perspectives from our team
Home.ctaSubtitle: To learn more about Skyward Holding Group's business and investment opportunities, we welcome you to get in touch.

About.heroSubtitle: A globally oriented international financial institution rooted in Hong Kong
About.overviewP1: Skyward Holding Group ("SKYW") is a fully licensed international financial institution headquartered in Hong Kong. The Group holds Type 6 (Advising on Corporate Finance) and Type 9 (Asset Management) licenses issued by the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) of Hong Kong, operating in strict compliance with Hong Kong's financial regulatory framework.
About.overviewP2: Since its establishment, SKYW has been guided by the mission of "Connecting Global Capital, Empowering Innovative Industries," delivering long-term sustainable investment returns for global institutional investors and high-net-worth clients through diversified business operations and professional investment management capabilities.
About.vision: To become a leading comprehensive international financial group in the Asia-Pacific region, earning the trust of global investors through outstanding investment capabilities and professional service quality.
About.mission: Connecting global capital with innovative industries, creating long-term value for clients through professional investment management and diversified financial services.
About.license6Desc: Advising on Corporate Finance — Providing advisory services for IPOs, mergers & acquisitions, and corporate restructuring.
About.license9Desc: Asset Management — Providing professional asset management and fund management services for institutional investors and HNW clients.
About.licensesNote: All operations are conducted under the regulatory framework of the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) of Hong Kong
About.globalSubtitle: The Group maintains offices across major financial centers worldwide, building a business network spanning Asia-Pacific, the Middle East, and Europe.

Business.heroSubtitle: Six business divisions covering the complete value chain from asset management to industrial investment

fund.title: Fund Management
fund.shortDesc: Professional fund management services for institutional investors and HNW clients, with strategies spanning equity, fixed income, and alternative assets.
fund.heroSubtitle: Professional asset management with diversified investment strategies
fund.overviewP1: Skyward Holding's Fund Management division, licensed under SFC Type 9, provides professional fund management and asset allocation services for global institutional investors and high-net-worth clients.
fund.overviewP2: Our investment team brings deep industry experience and an extensive global network, pursuing long-term stable returns through rigorous investment processes and risk management systems.
fund.strategy1Desc: Focused on equity opportunities in high-growth sectors including technology, healthcare, and consumer
fund.strategy2Desc: Investing in quality bonds and credit assets for stable cash flow returns
fund.strategy3Desc: Covering real estate, infrastructure, commodities, and other alternative asset classes
fund.strategy4Desc: Leveraging our global office network for cross-border asset allocation solutions

ipo.title: IPO Cornerstone Investment
ipo.shortDesc: Participating as professional cornerstone investors in quality IPOs, providing confidence endorsement for issuers and accessing scarce investment opportunities.
ipo.heroSubtitle: Deep participation in quality initial public offerings
ipo.overviewP1: Skyward Holding's IPO Cornerstone Investment division, leveraging our SFC Type 6 license and deep capital market expertise, participates as a professional cornerstone investor in quality IPO projects in Hong Kong and global capital markets.
ipo.overviewP2: Our cornerstone investments not only provide capital support and market confidence for issuing companies, but also screen investment targets with long-term growth potential through professional due diligence and valuation.
ipo.advantage1Desc: Rigorous due diligence process with deep analysis of industry trends and company fundamentals
ipo.advantage2Desc: Cornerstone investor participation provides positive market signals
ipo.advantage3Desc: Cornerstone investors enjoy priority allocation, accessing scarce investment opportunities
ipo.advantage4Desc: Focused on long-term value investing, growing alongside quality enterprises

gold.title: Gold / G-COIN
gold.shortDesc: Through the G-COIN digital gold platform, deeply integrating traditional gold industry with digital financial innovation to build a full-chain gold ecosystem.
gold.heroSubtitle: Deep integration of traditional gold industry with digital financial innovation
gold.overviewP1: Skyward Holding's Gold division operates the G-COIN digital gold platform, one of the Group's most innovative business lines. G-COIN digitizes physical gold through blockchain technology, building a full-chain ecosystem covering gold trading, refining, digital tokenization, and vault storage.
gold.overviewP2: Every G-COIN is backed by 100% physical gold reserves, ensuring the authenticity and security of digital gold assets. The platform partners with internationally certified vaults to provide world-leading gold storage and logistics services.
gold.feature1Desc: 100% physical gold reserves ensuring the real value of every G-COIN
gold.feature2Desc: Blockchain-based gold digitization enabling instant, low-cost transactions
gold.feature3Desc: Complete gold industry chain covering trading, refining, storage, and tokenization
gold.feature4Desc: Operating within regulatory frameworks with regular audits ensuring transparent compliance

credit.title: Commercial Credit Guarantee
credit.shortDesc: Professional credit guarantee and credit enhancement services for SMEs, facilitating enterprise financing and serving the real economy.
credit.overviewP1: Skyward Holding's Commercial Credit Guarantee division is dedicated to providing professional credit guarantee and credit enhancement services for small and medium enterprises. Through our scientific credit assessment system and efficient business processes, we help quality SMEs overcome financing challenges.
credit.overviewP2: As a bridge between financial institutions and real economy enterprises, our credit guarantee business effectively reduces information asymmetry between banks and enterprises, driving efficient allocation of financial resources to the real economy.
credit.service1Desc: Credit guarantee for bank loans, bond issuance, and other financing activities
credit.service2Desc: Guarantees for commercial contract performance, reducing counterparty risk
credit.service3Desc: Professional enterprise credit assessment system for scientific credit evaluation
credit.service4Desc: Various credit enhancement measures to improve overall enterprise creditworthiness

energy.title: Energy Projects
energy.shortDesc: Focused on investment opportunities in clean and traditional energy, driving energy industry transformation and sustainable development.
energy.heroSubtitle: Driving energy industry transformation and sustainable development
energy.overviewP1: Skyward Holding's Energy Investment division focuses on investment opportunities in the global energy industry, covering clean energy, traditional energy, and energy infrastructure. Through professional industry research and project evaluation, we identify energy investment projects with long-term value.
energy.overviewP2: Against the backdrop of global energy transition, we actively invest in wind, solar, energy storage, and other new energy sectors, while prudently capturing quality investment opportunities in traditional energy, contributing to the sustainable development of the global energy industry.
energy.area1Desc: Investing in wind, solar, energy storage, and other clean energy projects
energy.area2Desc: Prudent investment in quality oil, natural gas, and traditional energy assets
energy.area3Desc: Investment in power grids, natural gas pipelines, and energy infrastructure
energy.area4Desc: Focused on technological innovation and emerging business models in the energy sector

Contact.heroSubtitle: We look forward to building a partnership with you
Contact.formDisclaimer: By submitting this form, you agree to our Privacy Policy. We will respond to your inquiry within 2 business days.
Contact.hkAddress: The Center, 99 Queen's Road Central, Central, Hong Kong
Contact.szAddress: Science Park South, Nanshan District, Shenzhen

Legal.privacyContent: Skyward Holding Group ("SKYW" or "we") values and protects your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data. We collect personal information only within the scope necessary for business operations, including name, contact details, and company information. All data processing complies with applicable data protection laws and regulations.
Legal.termsContent: Welcome to the Skyward Holding Group website. By accessing or using this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. The content on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice, an offer, or solicitation. Any investment decisions should be based on independent professional judgment and due diligence.
Legal.disclaimerContent: This website is operated by Skyward Holding Group, which holds SFC Type 6 and Type 9 licenses. The information contained on this website is for reference only and does not constitute investment advice or solicitation to any person in any jurisdiction. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Investment involves risk, and investors may not be able to recover the full amount of their investment.

Footer.companyDesc: Skyward Holding Group is an international financial institution licensed by the Hong Kong SFC (Type 6 & Type 9).
Footer.licenseNote: Skyward Holding Group holds Type 6 and Type 9 licenses issued by the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) of Hong Kong.
Footer.riskWarning: Investment involves risk. Past performance is not indicative of future results.
